test_type: Frontend QA Smoke Test - CR-027, CR-029, CR-026
summary: QA smoke test for 3 CRs on Central Inventory app. All features verified: CR-027 Navigation Restructure (6 sections, 15 nav items, collapse/expand, routes, redirects), CR-029 Stock Inventory FG/Raw Split (3 tabs with counts, filtering works), CR-026 Production Unit Module (Run Production form, Production History, role-based visibility).

tests.details: All 6 sections found: DASHBOARD, INWARD, PRODUCTION, OUTWARD, REPORTS, SETTINGS. Section collapse/expand working correctly.

All 15 nav items found: operations-hub, vendor-management, raw-material-master, purchase, sub-recipe-master, run-production, production-history, store-management, product-catalog, stock-inventory, pending-queues, history-ledger, consumption-report, wastage-report, settings.
All 7 routes tested: /vendor-management, /raw-materials, /purchase, /sub-recipe-master, /store-management, /product-catalog, /inventory - all load correct pages.
StoreManagement page has Summary and Manage Stores tabs (data-testid='store-tab-summary' and 'store-tab-manage').
SubRecipeMaster page loads with sub-recipe list (4 recipes: Oats Cookies, Ragi Cookies, Sesame Cookies, Whole wheat Elachi Cookies). Search and Add Sub-Recipe button present.
3 tabs present: All (47), Finished Goods (4), Raw Materials (43). Tab counts shown correctly.
FG tab shows 4 rows (SubRecipe type items only): Oats Cookies, Ragi Cookies, Sesame Cookies, Whole wheat Elachi Cookies.
Raw tab shows 43 rows (inventory type items only). FG + Raw = All (4 + 43 = 47).
KPI cards present: Total Items (47), Low Stock Items (1), Categories (4).

Run Production page loads with sub-recipe selector showing 4 recipes. Recipe selection shows pre-production preview with ingredient requirements, health bars, required/available quantities, and estimated costs.
Production History page loads with 10 production runs. KPIs shown: Total Runs (10), Total FG Produced (1,905), Total Material Cost (₹4.9K). Sub-recipe staleness and cost trend sections present.

Outlet user (manager@outletdirectone.com) does NOT see: Production section, Sub-Recipe Master, Run Production, Production History, Raw Material Master, Product Catalog. Only sees: Operations Hub, Stock Inventory, Pending Queues, History & Ledger, Consumption Report, Wastage Report.

Master Store user (manager@centralkitchenalpha.com) DOES see: Production section with Run Production and Production History. Also sees: Vendor Management, Purchase, Store Management, Stock Inventory, etc.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 error when logging in as Master Store user (manager@centralkitchenalpha.com). Retry succeeded.

critical_code_review_comments: screenVisibility.js: NAV_SECTIONS correctly defines 6 sections with proper screen IDs for role-based filtering
Sidebar.jsx: Correctly uses visibleNavSections from useLoginContext for role-based nav rendering
App.js: All routes and redirects correctly configured per CR-027 spec
StockInventorySummary.jsx: FG/Raw tabs correctly filter by type='SubRecipe' vs type='inventory'
useStockInventory.js: stockType state and filtering logic correctly implemented
ProductionRunForm.jsx: Role gate correctly checks isTopLevel || isMiddleLevel
ProductionHistory.jsx: Role gate correctly checks isTopLevel || isMiddleLevel
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-027, CR-029, CR-026 all verified. Navigation restructure complete with 6 collapsible sections. Stock Inventory has FG/Raw tabs working. Production module accessible to Central Store and Master Store, hidden from Outlet. All routes and redirects working. Note: Master Store login had intermittent 500 error but retry succeeded.
